title: selaginella orbiculifolia
intro: Selaginella orbiculifolia, also known as the kidneywort or round-leaf spikemoss, is a type of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving respiratory function, and aiding in the treatment of kidney stones and other urinary tract issues. Selaginella orbiculifolia is often prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
